courses.title: Mastering ISO 20022: The Complete Payments Course
courses.subtitle: CBPR+, XML, Core Parties & Real Payment Flows
courses.contentSubTitle: Master ISO 20022 payment messaging, SWIFT MT formats, and real-world cross-border payment flows used in modern banking systems.
courses.description: Master ISO 20022 payment messages, XML structures, settlement methods, and real-world payment flows used in modern banking.
courses.mentorMessage: Meet me in the session — let’s get clarity on topic.
whatYouWillLearn: Master ISO 20022 messages like pain.001, pacs.008, pacs.002, camt.056 and camt.054
Understand correspondent banking and settlement methods
Decode XML structures and troubleshoot payment flows
Learn automated reconciliation techniques used in banking

courseData.title: Mastering ISO 20022 Overview
points: Master ISO 20022 payment messages and CBPR+ standards
Learn real-world payment flows used in modern banking
Gain clarity on core ISO 20022 concepts and migration

courseData.title: Core Banking & Payment Flow
points: Understand roles of banks in payment chain

courseData.title: XML Structure & Validation
points: Identify common XML errors in payments
Decode tags, nodes and hierarchy in messages

courseData.title: Reconciliation & Troubleshooting
points: Troubleshoot SWIFT and ISO message issues

courses.title: A Beginner's Guide to Cross-Border Payments
courses.subtitle: Mastering SWIFT Payments and Cross-Border Transactions
courses.contentSubTitle: Mastering SWIFT Payments and Cross-Border Transactions, Payments Basics, Payment Methods, Understanding How Money Moves.
courses.description: Learn payment systems, SWIFT network fundamentals, MT messages, payment methods, and ISO 20022 migration.
courses.mentorMessage: Meet me in the session — let’s get clarity on topic.
whatYouWillLearn: Understanding Payment Basics and the Building Blocks of Payments
Navigating the SWIFT Network: A Comprehensive Guide
Mastering Payment Methods and SWIFT Message Categories
Learn real use cases for SWIFT Messages like MT101, MT103, MT202, MT202 COV, MT191, MT192, MT195, MT196, MT199, MT900 and MT910
Understand Direct, Cover and Serial payment methods with examples
Preparing for Tomorrow: ISO20022 and Future Trends in Payments
Payments Interview Guide and Career Resources
Bonus: ISO20022 Guide and MT to MX Mapping Guide

courses.subtitle: SWIFT MT/MX Message Flow with Examples & MT vs MX Mapping

courses.description: Start your payments journey with SWIFT MT/MX messages, payment basics, ISO 20022 migration, and real message flow examples.
courses.mentorMessage: Meet me in the session — let’s get clarity on topic.
whatYouWillLearn: Learn the Basics of Payment Systems and SWIFT Network Fundamentals
Understand SWIFT Code, SWIFT FIN and GPA Messages
Master SWIFT MT Message Structure, Categories and Guidelines
Learn MT103 Serial and Cover Payment Methods with Message Examples
Understand MT Category 2 and Category 9 Messages
Explore SWIFT ISO 20022 MX Messages with End-to-End Message Flows
Understand Agents and Party Roles in MX Messages
Learn SWIFT Payment Groups and Migration Timelines
Understand pacs.008 Message Elements with Detailed Examples
Learn MT vs MX Field Mapping and Message Transformation
Explore SWIFT GPI and Latest Developments in Global Payments

courses.title: Introduction to Cross-Border Payments
courses.subtitle: Master the Fundamentals of Global Payment Systems
courses.contentSubTitle: A comprehensive course covering all aspects of Cross border payments.
courses.description: Learn correspondent banking, SWIFT standards, MT103 flows, foreign exchange concepts, and cross-border payment systems.
courses.mentorMessage: Meet me in the session — let’s get clarity on topic.
whatYouWillLearn: Understand Cross-Border Payments and Global Payment Flows
Learn the Fundamentals of Correspondent Banking
Understand How Payment System Models Work
Explore SWIFT Messages Used in Cross-Border Payments
Learn the Basics of the Foreign Exchange Market
Understand Serial and Cover Payment Methods with Practical Examples

courseData.title: Core Cross Border Payments Concepts
points: Understand how Payment system models work
Understand SWIFT messages used in cross border payments
Understand the serial and cover payment methods used in cross border payments

courseData.title: 2. Payment Systems Fundamentals
points: Payment System Models – Type 1 and Type 2

courses.title: Payment Systems, SWIFT Messaging & ISO 20022 – Complete Guide
courses.subtitle: Hands-On MT103, MT202 & pacs.008 Simulators
courses.contentSubTitle: TOOLS to practice MT103, MT202, pacs.008 & MT103→pacs.008; learn payments end to end and decode SWIFT/ISO message rules.
courses.description: Practice SWIFT and ISO 20022 message creation with interactive tools, MT→MX mapping, reconciliation and payment investigations.
courses.mentorMessage: Meet me in the session — let’s get clarity on topic.
whatYouWillLearn: Build Real Payment Messages Using Interactive MT103, MT202 and pacs.008 Simulators
Simulate MT103 to pacs.008 Conversion with Structured ISO 20022 XML Mapping
Decode and Interpret SWIFT MT Messages like MT103, MT202, MT940 and MT950
Understand Global Payment Systems Including Clearing, Settlement and Correspondent Banking
Gain Hands-On Experience Mapping SWIFT MT Messages to ISO 20022 MX Formats
Track Payment Lifecycle Events and Reconcile Transactions Using MT910, MT950, camt.053 and camt.054
Simulate Real-World Payment Investigations and Troubleshoot Failed Transactions
Learn How SWIFT, ACH, RTGS and FedNow Work in Modern Payment Infrastructure

courseData.title: Core Learning Outcomes
points: Build real payment messages using MT103, MT202 & pacs.008 with interactive simulators
Simulate MT103 → pacs.008 conversion using ISO 20022 mapping tools
Decode SWIFT MT messages like MT103, MT202, MT940, MT950
Understand clearing, settlement, correspondent and intermediary banking
Map SWIFT MT messages to ISO 20022 MX formats like pacs.008
Track payment lifecycle using MT910, MT950, camt.053, camt.054
Simulate payment investigations and troubleshoot failures
Learn SWIFT, ACH, RTGS and FedNow payment systems

courseData.title: 1. Course Introduction & Payment Basics
points: How Money Moves Between Banks – The Basics
Nostro, Vostro & Loro Accounts – Holding Foreign Balances
Clearing vs Settlement – What Happens Between Sending & Receiving?
Retail vs Wholesale Payments – How They Differ
Domestic vs Cross-Border Payments – Settlement Complexities

courseData.title: 4. SWIFT MT Messages Fundamentals
points: Key MT Messages (MT103, MT202, MT940, MT950)

courseData.title: 6. ISO 20022 & MX Messages
points: What is ISO 20022 and why migration is happening
Key Messages: pacs.008, pacs.009, camt.053, camt.054
